dependent_vars.definition: kernel-RDM vs cross-model feature-correspondence, seed-stable subset
dependent_vars.name: spearman_rho

n_planned.note: E8-R power rule (P8 §1.6, pre-D-SAE-spend): detectable rho derived from the REALIZED stable-subset size; <85 pairs => widen the matched concept set before freeze or pre-declare the larger detectable rho + the not-decidable band

endpoints.test: permutation test vs the shuffled-kernel null, p<0.01 per pair (P1 verbatim), BOTH new pairs must reject; effect reported as Spearman rho with bootstrap 95% CI

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row HC4 (verbatim): Measured range: 125M–160M families (+1 ≥1B pair if E8-R passes). Envelope: Open-weights families ≤7B; qualitative only above that. Anchor: SAE feature-stability results (Templeton 2024, Paulo–Belrose seed-stability) span to mid-size production models; quantitative ρ does not transfer across SAE training regimes.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §2 HC4 kill criterion, E8-R leg (verbatim): 'E8-R dead if the site-matched third family fails both new pairs (permutation test vs shuffled-kernel null, p≥0.01 per pair, effect reported as Spearman ρ with bootstrap 95% CI); A6 then has one unreplicated pass and is shelved, not pitched.'

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/
corpus_hashes.sae-dictionary-packs: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:d-sae (residual-stream, site-matched, seed-stability stratified per Paulo-Belrose)

runner_constraints.note: post-F2 infrastructure decision deferred by the maintainer at GNG-0; these pins are set by ops amendment or at this record's own freeze

title: E8-R — site-matched residual-stream SAE replication on a third family; sole primary = replication on the seed-stable subset (HC4 leg 1)
